name: Pumpkin Bread in Jars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and pumpkin pie spice.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the brown sugar and oil; beat until well combined.
3. Beat in the eggs. Add the pumpkin; mix well.
4. Add the flour mixture. Beat just until combined.
5. Stir in the currants. Pour the pumpkin mixture into 2 well-greased and floured half-pint straight-sided canning jars.
6. Cover the jars tightly with greased foil. Place a piece of crumpled foil in a 3 1/2 to 4 quart crockery cooker with liner in place.
7. Place the jars atop the crumpled foil. Cover; cook on high setting for 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours, or until a wooden toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Remove the jars from the cooker; cool for 10 minutes in the jars.
9. Remove the bread from the jars and cool thoroughly on a wire rack. Makes 2 loaves.
For a 3 1/2 to 4 quart cooker, use half all of the ingredients.
